productDisplayName: Baggit Women Oscar Taj Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This three-fold timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 19 cm x 9.5 cm Crafted from genuine leatheretteetteetteette, has a flap style three-fold opening with a magnetic button closure A velvet strip running along the upper for style Six card holders, two pockets, a key holder and an id holder on the left fold One compartment, a zippered pocket and two card holders on the centre fold One pocket on the inner flap A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
